project.spring-auth-server.title: Spring auth server for UCust startup
project.spring-auth-server.description: This dual-token authentication backend was written for the startup UCust. It's my first server using a dual-token authentication system with a long-lived refresh token (in the browser cookie) and a short-lived access token (in the request body), which, after its lifetime expires, must be refreshed using the refresh token via the /refresh endpoint.
project.pemz-site.title: PEMZ Site
project.pemz-site.description: This is the website of the PEMZ enterprise, developed by me on the Django framework.
project.test-phone.title: TestPhone
project.test-phone.description: This is a test mobile application developed with React Native.
